description_long: This is a rectangular bathtub with gently sloped sides and a wide, flat rim. The exterior and interior surfaces feature a marbled pattern in shades of beige and green, giving it a stone-like appearance. The rim is adorned with a decorative border, featuring a blue and white scroll motif interspersed with yellow floral accents at the corners. The interior base of the tub also displays a floral design, adding a touch of elegance. The bathtub appears to be made of a ceramic or porcelain material, possibly with a painted or glazed finish. There are no visible plumbing fixtures or drainage holes, and the overall design suggests a decorative, possibly vintage-inspired style.
description: A rectangular, marbled bathtub with a wide, ornate rim featuring blue and yellow floral patterns and a decorative interior base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bathtub, highlighting the ornate rim and marbled surface.
description_view_1: Angled view from the left, revealing the depth of the tub and the floral design on the interior base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite side of the rim and the marbled exterior surface.
description_view_3: Angled view from the right, emphasizing the interior floral motif and the decorative rim details.
